hero.desc: e-Matdaan makes democratic participation easy and secure. Cast your official vote from home, verified by your unique Aadhaar/Voter ID and location.

footer.brand_desc: Secure, transparent digital voting for modern democracies. Your vote matters.

about.title: About e-Matdaan
about.subtitle: The future of democracy is digital, secure, and accessible to everyone.
about.mission_desc: To provide a secure, transparent, and universally accessible platform for democratic elections, empowering every citizen to vote from anywhere in the world.
about.val_miss_desc: Build a secure digital voting environment that empowers citizens and strengthens democratic participation across the nation.
about.val_vis_desc: Deliver transparent, accessible elections through a premium online experience, backed by modern security standards and open governance.
about.val_why_desc: From real-time results to secure authentication, e-Matdaan is built to be elegant, reliable, and easy to use for every voter.
about.security_desc: Built with state-of-the-art encryption and blockchain-inspired verification to ensure that every vote is cast securely and counted transparently.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or need support? We're here to help.

auth.login_sub: Sign in securely to access the voting portal
auth.register_sub: Sign up to begin your secure voting journey

onboarding.title: Complete Your Profile
onboarding.subtitle: We need a few more details to set up your voter profile
onboarding.req_phone: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.

dashboard.ready: Ready to participate in the democratic process?

vote.title: Cast Your Vote

vote.already_voted: You have already voted in this election.
